_meta.task_brief: Sourcing licensed neighborhood photography for Crystal Kilpatrick Group rebuild
_meta.intended_destination: /Users/adamstyer/Documents/crystalkilpatrick/images/markets-research/  (saved here at /Users/adamstyer/Documents/Claude/Projects/kilpatrick/images/markets-research/ because the crystalkilpatrick path is outside Claude's mounted workspace)
_meta.license_policy: Only commercial-use, redistribution-permitted: CC0, Public Domain, CC-BY, CC-BY-SA (Wikimedia); Pexels License. NC/ND/unclear rejected.
_meta.apify_spend_usd_estimate: $0.24 — 8 Unsplash actor runs + ~80 results retrieved (est. ~$0.03/run). Wikimedia direct API and Pexels web fetch were free.
next_steps_for_adam: Spot-check each photo against the visual brief (warm editorial luxury, no people front-and-center, no real-estate-listing vibe).

kyle-78640 (2 photos) and south-austin-78745 (2 photos) still under target — both filled with Hill Country filler shots since neighborhood-specific Unsplash/Wikimedia coverage doesn't exist. Consider Adobe Stock / Getty / commission for landmark shots.
Move the markets-research folder into the real project at /Users/adamstyer/Documents/crystalkilpatrick/images/.
data_gaps: kyle-78640: 2 photos (under target of 3). Both are generic Hill Country filler — neither shows Old Town Kyle, Plum Creek, or Lake Kyle. Recommend paid stock for landmark coverage.
south-austin-78745: 2 photos (under target). Both are generic Texas/Hill Country, not South Lamar/Garrison Park/Manchaca specific. Recommend paid stock or local commission.
southwest-austin-maple-run-78749: 3 photos but only Violet Crown Trail is on-territory. The Pexels oak + bluebonnet are good filler but not landmark-specific.
belterra-bear-creek-78737: 3 photos but only Bear Creek (River) is place-specific. Hill Country mountains + bluebonnets are filler.

No usable Kyle, TX imagery found via Wikimedia Commons (the only Wikimedia hit was a Texas-colleges chart, rejected). Pexels strict-Texas pool was depleted by other neighborhoods. Recommend supplementing via paid stock for this market card.
photos.rejected_reason: no candidates passed quality + geo + license filter; recommend Adobe Stock / Getty / Stocksy or local commission for Old Town Kyle, Plum Creek, Lake Kyle landmarks.

rejected_examples.title: File:Tubercular wife and daughter of agricultural day laborer, Poteau Creek near Spiro, Oklahoma, 8b22227.jpg
rejected_examples.rejected_reason: Wrong state (Oklahoma) and includes documentary subjects of people. Slipped in via 'creek' search.

rejected_examples.title: File:Foot Locker Store Barton Creek Mall Austin Texas.jpg
rejected_examples.rejected_reason: Mall storefront — does not fit luxury Hill Country aesthetic.

rejected_examples.title: File:KU-559A (5 of 17) - DPLA — many pages
rejected_examples.rejected_reason: Scanned book pages from Digital Public Library of America (DPLA) collection — not photographs.

rejected_examples.title: Cedar Hill State Park (multiple files)
rejected_examples.rejected_reason: Cedar Hill State Park is in the Dallas area (Dallas County), NOT Cedar Park, TX. Wrong place — common confusion. Filtered out.

rejected_examples.title: 1940 Census Enumeration District Descriptions (multiple TX counties)
rejected_examples.rejected_reason: NARA scanned census documents, not photographs.

rejected_examples.title: File:Fire ^ Wildfire - Leander, Texas, September 20, 2011 — FEMA
rejected_examples.rejected_reason: Disaster documentary photo with people; doesn't fit warm editorial brief.

rejected_examples.title: Buda (Hungary) results
rejected_examples.rejected_reason: Hungarian city, wrong continent. Geo-confirm filter caught these.

rejected_examples.title: Pristine Beach at Pedernales, Dominican Republic
rejected_examples.rejected_reason: Wrong continent — Pexels search 'Pedernales Texas' returned a Dominican Republic beach photo.

rejected_examples.title: Lush Oak Foliage Overlooking Pécs, Hungary
View of Stone Oak Neighborhoods from the Window of a Car
rejected_examples.rejected_reason: Stone Oak is a San Antonio neighborhood, not Austin Hill Country.

rejected_examples.title: Multiple Austin skyline / capitol shots
rejected_examples.rejected_reason: Doesn't fit residential market-card aesthetic; reads as commercial/downtown not Hill Country residential.
